# Frontend React Engineer

## Overview
We are looking for a Frontend React Engineer to build user-facing interfaces with a strong focus on performance, accessibility, and maintainable UI architecture.

## Responsibilities
- Build responsive web UIs with React
- Collaborate with designers on UI/UX implementation
- Implement reusable components and design systems
- Optimize performance and bundle size
- Write tests for critical UI flows

## Requirements (Must-have)
- React (3+ years)
- JavaScript/TypeScript
- HTML5/CSS3
- State management (Redux, Zustand, or equivalent)
- Component testing (React Testing Library or similar)

## Nice-to-have
- Next.js
- Tailwind CSS
- Storybook
- GraphQL
- CI/CD knowledge

## Seniority
Mid

## Domain
frontend
